publishedAbstract: * `There is a daemon running older version of ceph` warning ODF 4.X Cluster. * The Ceph cluster in ODF deployment is alerting for `DAEMON_OLD_VERSION` ``` $ cat ceph_health_detail HEALTH_WARN There is a daemon running an older version of ceph [WRN] DAEMON_OLD_VERSION: There is a daemon running an older version of ceph mon.a is running an older version of ceph: 14.2.11-208.el8cp ```
publishedTitle: 'There is a daemon running older version of ceph' warning in ODF 4.X Cluster.
